task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Outdoor & Recreation' parent category and its two subcategories ('Camping Gear' and 'Fitness Equipment') have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the WooCommerce Categories page (Products -> Categories). You should see 'Outdoor & Recreation' and underneath it, 'Camping Gear' and 'Fitness Equipment' (usually indicated by a dash prefix like '- Camping Gear' to show hierarchy).

task_completion.description: Verify that the specified products have been moved to their new subcategories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the WooCommerce Products list. The 'Categories' column should show 'Camping Gear' for 'Portable Camping Hammock', and 'Fitness Equipment' for both 'Yoga Mat Premium' and 'Resistance Band Set'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'bestseller', 'eco-friendly', and 'gift-idea' tags have been created and assigned to the correct products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the WooCommerce Products list. The 'Tags' column should show 'bestseller' for Wireless Bluetooth Headphones and Yoga Mat Premium; 'eco-friendly' for Organic Cotton T-Shirt and Bamboo Cutting Board Set; and 'gift-idea' for LED Desk Lamp and Ceramic Plant Pot Set.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct products are marked as 'Featured'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the WooCommerce Products list. The 'Star' icon column (Featured) should be filled/highlighted (usually solid black or blue instead of an empty outline) for 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' and 'Yoga Mat Premium'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the short description for 'Portable Camping Hammock' has been updated to the exact specified text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the product edit page for 'Portable Camping Hammock' (specifically the 'Product short description' text box) OR the frontend product page. The text must exactly read: 'Ultralight double hammock perfect for backpacking and outdoor adventures. Supports up to 500 lbs.'

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce web interface to make these changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the WordPress admin dashboard (wp-admin) in a web browser, not terminal windows executing wp-cli commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Verify that the changes were actually saved and applied, not just typed into form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for WordPress success banners (e.g., 'Product updated', 'Category added') or verify the final state from the main Products/Categories list views rather than unsaved edit screens.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Category Hierarchy: 'Outdoor & Recreation' (Parent) -> 'Camping Gear' (Subcategory) & 'Fitness Equipment' (Subcategory). Category Assignments: 'Portable Camping Hammock' -> Camping Gear; 'Yoga Mat Premium' & 'Resistance Band Set' -> Fitness Equipment. Tag Assignments: 'bestseller' -> Wireless Bluetooth Headphones, Yoga Mat Premium; 'eco-friendly' -> Organic Cotton T-Shirt, Bamboo Cutting Board Set; 'gift-idea' -> LED Desk Lamp, Ceramic Plant Pot Set. Featured Products (Starred): Wireless Bluetooth Headphones, Yoga Mat Premium. Short Description for 'Portable Camping Hammock': 'Ultralight double hammock perfect for backpacking and outdoor adventures. Supports up to 500 lbs.'
